subject: Mathematics
notes: Core section | 45 questions | 50 minutes | Score range: 1–36 | 4 answer choices (reduced from 5 in 2025)

sub_topics: Number and Quantity — integers, rational and irrational numbers, and their properties
Real number system and number classifications
Vectors and matrices (introductory)
Complex numbers (introductory)
Algebra — linear equations and inequalities in one and two variables
Systems of linear equations and inequalities
Polynomial expressions — operations and factoring
Rational expressions and equations
Radical and exponential expressions
Absolute value equations and inequalities
Functions — function notation and evaluating functions
Domain and range of functions
Linear, quadratic, polynomial, and exponential functions
Inverse functions and compositions of functions
Graphical behavior and transformations of functions
Piecewise and step functions (introductory)
Logarithmic functions (introductory)
Geometry — properties of lines, angles, and parallel lines
Properties of triangles (congruence, similarity, Pythagorean theorem)
Properties of circles (arc, chord, sector, tangent)
Properties of polygons and quadrilaterals
Perimeter, area, and volume of 2D and 3D shapes
Coordinate geometry — plotting, distance, midpoint, slope
Equations of lines and circles on the coordinate plane
Trigonometric ratios — sine, cosine, tangent in right triangles
Trigonometric functions and their graphs
Law of sines and law of cosines
Radian measure and the unit circle
Statistics and Probability — mean, median, mode, and range
Standard deviation and data spread (conceptual)
Probability of single and compound events
Permutations and combinations
Interpreting data from tables, graphs, scatterplots, and histograms
Rates, ratios, and percentages in real-world contexts
Proportional relationships and scaling
Area, surface area, and volume calculations
Average (mean) and median in applied problems
Expressing numbers in multiple forms (fractions, decimals, percent)
Multi-step problem solving combining concepts from multiple math areas
Interpreting mathematical results in context
